description_long: This object consists of three rectangular desks or tables, each slightly smaller than the one in front of it, arranged in a stepped, nested formation. The design is minimalist, with clean, straight lines and a uniform, dark finish across all surfaces. Each desk features a flat top supported by four slender legs at the corners, with no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements. The overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for environments that require modular or flexible workspace arrangements. The surfaces appear smooth and hard, likely made from metal or a high-density engineered material. The set is visually cohesive, with each desk fitting neatly beneath the next, suggesting stackability or space-saving storage.
description: A set of three nested, rectangular desks with a minimalist, modern design and a uniform dark finish. Each desk is flat-topped, supported by slender legs, and designed for modular workspace use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three desks nested together, highlighting their stepped arrangement and uniform dark surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of each desk and the separation between them, with all three desks aligned in parallel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the desks, emphasizing their consistent height and the clean, unadorned design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staggered arrangement and the open space beneath each desk, with all legs visible.
attribute_location: office lobby, co-working space, or modern public waiting area
attribute_orientation: The largest desk is intended to face the user, with the two smaller desks nested behind it; the open, unobstructed side is the functional front.
attribute_usage_context: modular workspace or waiting area table set for collaborative or flexible use
